path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 03 - Mario Kart (Wii, 3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2008)\01. Mario Circuit - Super Mario Kart.mp3
description: This is such a good remix holy cow. A bit tragic that it's the only song from the original Mario Kart but we take it. I love the starting sound effect, and the Wii Sports-esque synth lead.
title: Mario Circuit
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 03: Mario Kart

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 03 - Mario Kart (Wii, 3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2008)\02. Luigi Raceway - Mario Kart 64.mp3
description: I pick this remix in tournament so often. Why? Because it's a huge banger that everyone knows and loves. This music has been used in so many tracks throughout Mario Kart history and for good reason. It's just such a bop.
title: Luigi Raceway
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 03: Mario Kart

filename: 03. Rainbow Road - Mario Kart - Double Dash!!.mp3
path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 03 - Mario Kart (Wii, 3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2008)\03. Rainbow Road - Mario Kart - Double Dash!!.mp3
description: This is a total classic and I love it. I often play this one in tournament when my Peach needs a power-up. Rainbow Road music is its own genre and this one may be the most quintessential of that unique vibe. It feels like a victory lap!
title: Rainbow Road
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 03: Mario Kart

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 03 - Mario Kart (Wii, 3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2008)\04. Waluigi Pinball - Mario Kart DS.mp3
description: This is an excellent fast-paced remix of one of the absolute highlights of the Mario Kart DS soundtrack. They really smashed it. I also really love that they included the Ruins theme from Wario Land: Shake it. I don't know WHY they did that, the game wasn't even out, but sure!
title: Waluigi Pinball
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 03: Mario Kart

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 03 - Mario Kart (Wii, 3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2008)\05. Mushroom Gorge - Mario Kart Wii.mp3
description: So disappointing that they put in this track from the Wii and not literally anything else. I always felt that this one sounds like shit (check out my rankings of all the Mario Kart music elsewhere on this site). Ugh, so much wasted potential. This could have been Coconut Mall.
title: Mushroom Gorge
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 03: Mario Kart

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 03 - Mario Kart (Wii, 3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2008)\06. Circuit - Mario Kart 7.mp3
description: This track is pretty mid, but this is the best remix of it for sure. I love that they sped it up. I think they did a great job with it.
title: Circuit
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 03: Mario Kart

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 03 - Mario Kart (Wii, 3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2008)\07. Rainbow Road - Mario Kart 7.mp3
description: Mario Kart 7 is in my opinion very mid, but it did have an amazing Rainbow Road, so good on them for including this from that game.
title: Rainbow Road
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 03: Mario Kart

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 03 - Mario Kart (Wii, 3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2008)\08. Rainbow Road Medley.mp3
description: This is a great selection of Rainbow Roads for this medley! I especially love the inclusion of Super Circuit's one, meaning we at least get some representation from that excellent game. Also DS's more peaceful/melancholic version is in too. Great.
title: Rainbow Road Medley
composers: Kenta Nagata, Satomi Terui, Shinobu Tanaka, Kenichi Nishimaki, Masanobu Matsunaga, Minako Hamano
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 03: Mario Kart
original-game: Mario Kart 7 / Mario Kart DS / Mario Kart: Super Circuit

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 03 - Mario Kart (Wii, 3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2008)\09. Mario Kart Stadium - Mario Kart 8.mp3
description: This is such a mid choice. Whoever gives a fuck about the first, plain-ass level in a Mario Kart game?
title: Mario Kart Stadium
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 03: Mario Kart

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 03 - Mario Kart (Wii, 3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2008)\10. Mario Circuit - Mario Kart 8.mp3
description: This is a second boring-ass generic track from Mario Kart 8. They had so much to choose from and they went for this. I get that there is a stage that is literally this track so fine. But whatever.
title: Mario Circuit
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 03: Mario Kart

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 03 - Mario Kart (Wii, 3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2008)\11. Cloudtop Cruise - Mario Kart 8.mp3
description: This track is very Mario Galaxy coded and it's cool that they remixed it. The original has this rock part when you enter the thundercloud - this remix is just pretty much that. Shred an electric guitar over a thing then bam, you have a rock remix. I just think it's pretty plain.
title: Cloudtop Cruise
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 03: Mario Kart

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 03 - Mario Kart (Wii, 3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2008)\12. Rainbow Road - Mario Kart 8.mp3
description: What is this doing here? This is the most mid Rainbow Road and it gets its own spot? Eine Schande.
title: Rainbow Road
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 03: Mario Kart

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 03 - Mario Kart (Wii, 3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2008)\13. Excitebike - Mario Kart 8.mp3
description: They added some of the DLC tracks in Ultimate which I appreciate, but their choices weren't great. I think this racetrack is super overrated and the music isn't that great.
title: Excitebike
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 03: Mario Kart

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 03 - Mario Kart (Wii, 3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2008)\14. Dragon Driftway.mp3
description: This one is great. Good choice from the DLC tracks. I really like it. In Mario Kart World they slayed with the remix of this track.
title: Dragon Driftway
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 03: Mario Kart

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 03 - Mario Kart (Wii, 3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2008)\15. Ice Ice Outpost.mp3
description: Why did they put this in?? Such plain music from a track nobody cared about. Disappointing.
title: Ice Ice Outpost
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 03: Mario Kart
